title: Hi Gang!
writer: Bebe Daniels, Marriott Edgar, Val Guest
actors: Bebe Daniels, Ben Lyon, Vic Oliver
plot: Bebe and Ben are husband and wife (precisely as in real life), striving for the best scoop for their rival radio broadcasts, amidst troubles caused by Vic Oliver. Bebe, now Miss Liberty for the war effort, has an exclusive: a Brit...
